title: Takoyaki Banana Bites
description: A unique dessert inspired by Japanese street food, combining crispy takoyaki with caramelized bananas. Perfect for a sweet snack or dessert.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan with 2 tbsp oil over medium heat.
In a bowl, mix together flour, sugar, and cinnamon powder.
Add eggs, milk, and mix well until combined.
Add the mixture to the hot pan and spread evenly.
When the edges start to set, add sliced bananas on top.
Once the bananas are caramelized, use a cookie cutter to cut out shapes.
Dust with sugar and serve immediately.
If desired, drizzle with tempting (vanilla extract) before serving.
